changeSet.author: gfh
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO evaluation_periods (id, type, start_date, end_date, submission_deadline, status, auto_created, created_by, created_at, closed_at) VALUES (1, 'QUARTERLY', '2026-01-01', '2026-03-31', '2026-04-05 18:00:00', 'CLOSED', false, 1, '2025-12-15 10:00:00', '2026-04-10 10:00:00'), (2, 'QUARTERLY', '2026-04-01', '2026-06-30', '2026-07-05 18:00:00', 'ACTIVE', false, 1, '2026-03-20 10:00:00', NULL);
